---
title: "seurat_to_anndata"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-22"
---
Converting v1 Seurat Object into anndata
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(reticulate)
library(anndata)
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
load("~/Desktop/ancestors/GSE105010_fall.inDrops.RData")
X_rna <- fall@data
obs <- data.frame(clusters = as.character(fall@ident))
rownames(obs) <- names(fall@ident)
```

```{r}
obsm <- list(X_tsne = as.matrix(fall@tsne.rot),
             X_pca = as.matrix(fall@pca.rot))
```

**Reticulate Anndata package**\
Make sure you have selected a Python interpreter by checking RStudio>Tools>Global Options>Python
```{r}
anndata <- reticulate::import("anndata", convert = FALSE)

adata <- anndata$AnnData(
  X = Matrix::t(X_rna),
  obs = obs,
  obsm = obsm)

write_h5ad(adata, "ZF3.h5ad") # File name for RNA Anndata
```
